title: Brazilian Creamy Bitter Soup
description: A Brazilian-inspired creamy soup with a bitter twist, perfect for a cold day. This soup combines the richness of cream with the tanginess of pickled ingredients.
instructions: Heat the soup broth in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the pickled onion and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the Brazilian bitter melon and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Return the pot to the stovetop and add the cream.
Stir the soup over low heat until the cream has melted and the soup is heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
